hero.title: Sharp presentation.
hero.description: A professional online presence for Legends Barbershop, bringing verified services, contact details, reviews, location, and booking access into one composed experience.

brandStatement.description: Legends Barbershop already has public customer proof. This concept shows how the shop could present its services and make the next step clearer for new clients.

principles.title: A clearer path,
principles.description: A strong barbershop website should make the essentials easy to understand without inventing what the shop has not published.

items.title: Clear Services
items.body: Customers can understand the shop's verified offerings before they call or book.

items.title: Trusted Proof
items.body: Public ratings and review volume support the shop's reputation without fabricated testimonials.

items.title: Simple Booking
items.body: The verified booking or contact path remains visible throughout the experience.

items.title: Mobile Confidence
items.body: Contact, directions, hours, and service information stay easy to use on a phone.

shop.description: This visual direction gives Legends Barbershop a polished online setting while keeping business facts separate from approved concept imagery.

header.title: A professional
header.intro: Legends Barbershop in Pasadena appears to use Booksy for customer booking. I couldn’t verify an owner, named staff, services, prices, or social profiles from the supplied public pages.

founding.title: What can be verified.
paragraphs: Legends Barbershop in Pasadena appears to use Booksy for customer booking. I couldn’t verify an owner, named staff, services, prices, or social profiles from the supplied public pages.
No founding year, ownership story, or leadership claim is presented unless it was verified in the collected public sources.

standard.title: A clearer
paragraphs: The website concept prioritizes the information customers need before they call or book.
Verified facts remain distinct from controlled design language and approved visual assets.

values.title: Public reputation
values.body: 145 public Google reviews provide a meaningful signal of the shop's local reputation.

values.title: Service clarity
values.body: Verified service information is placed where customers can understand it quickly.

values.title: Direct contact
values.body: The public phone, location, directions, and booking path remain easy to reach.

values.title: Truthful presentation
values.body: Unknown history, specialties, prices, and customer quotations are not invented to fill the design.
